% check a.php
a.php:5:1: $x is of type: AnonymousClass@1 (DEBUG)
a.php:9:1: $y is of type: stdClass (DEBUG)

% check b.php
b.php:32:1: $c is of type: string (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

$x = new class extends \stdClass {
};
#debugType $x

$class = 'It\Does\Not\Matter';
$y = new $class;
#debugType $y
-- b.php --
<?php

class Foo
{
	public function __construct()
	{
	}

	public function process()
	{
		$x = new class
		{
			public string $id;

			public function __construct()
			{
			}
		}

		return new class
		{
		}
	}

	public function check(): string
	{
	}
}

$foo = new Foo;
$c = $foo->check();
#debugType $c
